deals.name: General Magic
deals.notes: AI agents for insurance via SMS/iMessage/RCS. Led by Radical Ventures, a16z speedrun. Quote times from 30min to <3min.

deals.name: Baba Technologies
deals.notes: Smart glasses for people with dysarthria/motor impairments. Founded by ALS caregivers. Early stage, building first prototype. hello@babatech.io

deals.name: Schematik
deals.notes: Hardware dev platform — describe electronics in plain English, generates code + wiring diagrams. Supports Arduino/ESP32/RPi. Beta. Based in Europe. @samuelbeek

deals.name: Sky Valley
deals.notes: Adaptive software exoskeleton — answering 'how do I make my software adaptive?' Originally positioned around capturing developer intent, now refocusing on differentiation. Looking to hire design engineers and invest in brand. Product: getdiffer.com | Deck: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/deck/bggt_lgDLI-d | Data room: https://deck.skyvalley.ac/r/bggt_lgDLI-d | Product doc: https://docs.google.com/document/d/14tfS7PENfOq3V5izCt7lTEzT-_CmEkQ30RWhrVqm0OU/edit | iris@skyvalley.ac, noam@skyvalley.ac
